meta.title: Inspirational Quotes
meta.description: Simple quotes that inspire responsible living, kindness, and civic awareness.

items.text: Good citizens don't wait for change—they create it.
items.author: CivicSense

items.text: Respect for public spaces begins with personal responsibility.
items.author: CivicSense

items.text: Every wrapper picked up is one step toward a cleaner world.
items.author: CivicSense

items.text: Small civic habits build strong communities.
items.author: CivicSense

items.text: Be the reason your neighborhood feels welcoming.
items.author: CivicSense
